short_summary: War ongoing; US focus on Iran
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; US-Iran deal negotiations and Israeli strikes on Beirut reinforce concern that US attention and resources may be diverted away from Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (active combat)
top_events.summary: War ongoing with no qualitative change this cycle — remains the defining reality of daily life for all Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal Sunday signing; Israel strikes Beirut same day
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran deal and Middle East, combined with Israeli military action, raises concern that Western attention and aid prioritization may shift away from Ukraine.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU-Ukraine accession talks advancing is a meaningful long-term signal of Western commitment to Ukraine's future, offering modest morale and strategic reassurance.
